2026-07-10 15:42:01

Yesterday - Markets continued to grind higher as investor confidence improved, with broad participation supporting the ongoing advance. Although day-to-day volatility remained present, the overall trend stayed constructive, allowing TurboRegime to maintain its RiskOn allocation. The strategy continues to participate in market strength while preserving a modest defensive allocation should conditions unexpectedly deteriorate.

Today - Seven trading days into the current RiskOn regime, the trade has strengthened to a gain of 0.89%, while the maximum drawdown since the transition remains just -0.22%. The improvement over the past several sessions illustrates the benefit of remaining patient during the early stages of a new regime. Rather than reacting to short-term fluctuations, TurboRegime has allowed the market trend to develop while maintaining its disciplined allocation.

No changes to the portfolio are indicated at this time. The model continues to monitor market momentum and participation for confirmation that the current advance is either strengthening toward a potential Turbo opportunity or weakening enough to warrant a more defensive posture.

TReg Regime  - we remain in RiskOn, active since July 1. The current trade has transitioned from a modest early drawdown into positive territory while experiencing very little volatility. This steady progression is characteristic of the strategy's objective—to identify sustainable market trends rather than attempting to capture every short-term price swing. Allocation changes will continue to occur only after confirmed end-of-day signals.

Live Performance Since Launch - Today marks 100 days since live performance tracking began on April 1, 2026. During that period, TurboRegime has executed just six live trades while producing a cumulative return of 32.81%, compared with 14.93% for a buy-and-hold investment in SPY over the same period. The result is an outperformance of 17.88 percentage points while navigating multiple market regimes using a disciplined, rules-based approach.

Perhaps most encouraging is that the live results continue to closely mirror the historical backtests. The strategy has successfully transitioned between RiskOff, RiskOn, and RiskOn++ allocations as market conditions evolved, demonstrating that the underlying methodology has remained consistent in real-world trading. While 100 days represents only the beginning of TurboRegime's live track record, the results to date provide encouraging evidence that the strategy's disciplined approach can translate from historical testing to live execution.
